adjustment_rules.stall: WROC > -0.3 kg/week at 14-day review → reduce training day carbs by 20g
adjustment_rules.overshoot: WROC < -0.7 kg/week at 14-day review → increase training day carbs by 20g
adjustment_rules.lbm_loss_alert: If LBM drops > 0.5 kg between sessions → increase protein and review caloric deficit immediately
